title: Query on rtree unexpectedly yields 0 rather than 0.0
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE rt0 USING rtree(c0, c1, c2);
CREATE VIEW v0(c0) AS SELECT DISTINCT rt0.c1 FROM rt0;
SELECT v0.c0 FROM v0, rt0 WHERE v0.c0 = rt0.c1;
key_bug_features: SELECT with WHERE clause returns incorrect value type
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE rt1 USING rtree(c0, c1, c2);
CREATE VIEW v1(c0) AS SELECT DISTINCT rt1.c1 FROM rt1;
SELECT v1.c0 FROM v1, rt1 WHERE v1.c0 = rt1.c1 + 0.0;
